candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not the target; non-current assets are excluded from ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Balance sheet cash-like line; values match the cash flow statement ending cash balance, indicating cash and cash equivalents.
Cash flow item, not balance sheet cash balance.
Cash flow item, not cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Operating Activities
candidates.why: Operating cash flow, not ending cash balance.
Investing cash flow detail, not total cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Sale of Shares net of Cash
candidates.why: Investing/financing detail, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Investments in shares net of cash
candidates.why: Investing detail, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Investing Activities
candidates.why: Cash flow subtotal, not cash and cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist. 'Bank Deposits' matches 'Net Cash - Ending Balance' in the cash flow statement and is the best balance-sheet proxy for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Not the target; non-current liabilities are excluded from LCT.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Best match for current maturities of long-term debt while explicitly excluding leases, which fits the baseline STD definition.
Direct match for short-term debt; should be included alongside current portion of long-term debt if separate.
Could include current long-term debt but may include lease-related amounts; less preferred than the explicit excluding-leases line.
Could capture current debt maturities in one year, but appears supplementary and may overlap with other debt lines; less preferred.
Candidate for short-term debt, but no reported values here and not needed when cleaner debt lines exist.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Used the minimal non-overlapping set that captures current maturities plus short-term borrowings while excluding leases. Avoided 'Current LT Debt' because the explicit excluding-leases line is cleaner.

candidates.why: Best available current liability line for taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.
Deferred tax is non-current/timing-related, not taxes payable.
Cash flow item, not balance sheet taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed. 'Taxes' is the best balance-sheet match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Best reported balance-sheet line for total/net property, plant and equipment under IFRS-style tangibles terminology.
Would be gross PPE, but values are blank and net PPE is generally preferred when available.
Intangibles are not PPE.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist. 'Net, Tangibles' is the clearest total/net PPE-equivalent line and is preferred over gross/component rows.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total assets line.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Operating Activities
candidates.why: Direct reported net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not net operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Operating Activities

variables.notes: Selected the reported operating cash flow subtotal.
